text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ashish

Log:
  - Fix brokenness with net/libsignal 2.3.3. Upstream depends on
    particular version (2.3.2), so reference its distfile, build
    it in tree.
  - Bump PORTREVISION as dependencies are changed

  PR:		245281
